To convert Direct Current to Alternating Current

unit1.quiz_title: Teachers Baseline STEM & Tinkering Exam - Paper 2

questions.text: Why is a diode used in an electrical circuit?
options: To allow electric current to flow in only one direction
To step up the voltage of the source power
To store energy in an electromagnetic field

questions.text: What is the function of the shaft in a DC motor?
options: The rotating rod that outputs mechanical power to turn wheels or gears
The plastic outer shell protecting the motor core
The terminal pins where power wires are connected

questions.text: What is the primary use of an RFID system in smart systems?
options: To wirelessly read data stored on tags for tracking and identification
To measure soil moisture levels in smart gardens
To regulate voltage levels supplied to microcontroller chips

questions.text: In a 4-band resistor, what does the first color band represent?
options: The first digit of the resistance value

questions.text: Which resistor band color represents a multiplier value of 100?
What is the tolerance value of a resistor ending with a gold band?
Calculate the voltage if the current is 2A and the resistance is 10 Ohms.
Calculate the current flowing if the voltage is 12V and the resistance is 4 Ohms.
Calculate the resistance in a circuit with 9V voltage and 3A current.
Where are resistors used and why?
options: In circuits to limit current flow and protect sensitive components
Inside chemical batteries to generate charge
In mechanical motors to increase raw rotation speed

questions.text: How are the outer power rails along the edges of this board connected?
options: Horizontally along the entire length of the row
Vertically in columns of five connected holes
They are separate and not interconnected at all

questions.text: What is this development board primarily used for in electronics prototyping?
options: IoT projects requiring built-in Wi-Fi connectivity
Providing high-torque mechanical rotation to robotic arms

questions.text: What does this sensor primarily detect in security or automation systems?
options: Infrared radiation emitted by moving warm bodies
Ultrasonic echo signals for distance calculations
Ambient visible light levels in a room

questions.text: What motor type is shown in this image?
What is the primary function of this item?
options: Making temporary electrical connections on a breadboard
Soldering heavy power joints together permanently
Insulating open high-voltage power lines safely

questions.text: What tool is used to melt solder and permanently join electrical components on a board?

Which component generates audio tones using the piezoelectric effect?
What safety equipment protects your eyes from flying solder or wire clippings in a lab?
A resistor has strict polarity and must only be connected in a specific direction in a circuit.
A diode acts as a one-way electrical valve, allowing current to flow freely in both directions.
The ESP8266-based development board features built-in Wi-Fi capabilities for smart connections.
Exposing an LDR to higher light intensity causes its electrical resistance to decrease significantly.
RFID tags must have direct, clear line-of-sight contact with the reader antenna to be scanned.
An ultrasonic sensor uses high-frequency light waves to calculate distances to obstacles.
The center isolation groove of a breadboard splits and separates the column connections on either side.
A DC motor shaft only rotates when a sufficient voltage is applied across its terminal pins.
